    DB - package DB
     
    DBController - Class in DB
    DBController is responsible for managing database operations related to reservations, including CRUD operations.

    The default port number used by the server if none is specified.

    DeleteOpeningHoursHandler - Class in handlers
    Handler for processing the server response after attempting to delete weekly opening hours.
    DeleteOpeningHoursHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.DeleteOpeningHoursHandler
     
    DeleteOpeningHoursRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request to delete the opening hours for a specific day in the restaurant's schedule.
    DeleteOpeningHoursRequest(Day) - Constructor for class messages.DeleteOpeningHoursRequest
    Constructs a new request to delete opening hours for the specified day.
    deleteRegularOpeningHours(WeeklyOpeningHours) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Deletes the regular opening hours for a specific day.
    deleteSpecialDate() - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Deletes the selected special date and updates the server.
    deleteSpecialDate(LocalDate) - Method in class DAO.RestaurantSettingsDAO
    Permanently removes a special date entry from the database. * @param date the LocalDate to remove.
    deleteSpecialDate(LocalDate) - Method in class DAO.SpecialDatesDAO
    Permanently removes a special date entry from the database.
    deleteSpecialDate(LocalDate) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Deletes a special date
    deleteSpecialDate(LocalDate) - Method in class logicControllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Deletes a special date and cancels all reservations scheduled for that date.
    DeleteSpecialDateCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for removing a special date (holiday or closure) from the restaurant's calendar.
    DeleteSpecialDateCommand() - Constructor for class commands.DeleteSpecialDateCommand
     
    DeleteSpecialDateHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles the server response for deleting a special date from the restaurant settings.
    DeleteSpecialDateHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.DeleteSpecialDateHandler
     
    DeleteSpecialDateRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to delete an existing special date from the restaurant system.
    DeleteSpecialDateRequest(LocalDate) - Constructor for class messages.DeleteSpecialDateRequest
    Constructs a new DeleteSpecialDateRequest with the specified date.
    deleteTable(int) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
    Deletes a table record from the database by its ID.
    deleteTable(int) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Deletes a table
    deleteTable(int) - Method in class logicControllers.TableSettingsController
    Removes a table from the restaurant system.
    DeleteTable(Table) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
    Removes an existing table from the database using a Table object reference.
    DeleteTableCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for removing a table from the system.
    DeleteTableCommand() - Constructor for class commands.DeleteTableCommand
     
    DeleteTableHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles the server response for deleting a table.
    DeleteTableHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.DeleteTableHandler
     
    DeleteTableRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to delete a table from the restaurant system.
    DeleteTableRequest(int) - Constructor for class messages.DeleteTableRequest
    Constructs a new DeleteTableRequest with the specified table ID.
